2604.26312.title: Classification of Public Opinion on the Free Nutritional Meal Program on YouTube Media Using the LSTM Method
2604.26312.paper_summary: Public opinion towards the Free Nutritious Meal Program (MBG) on YouTube social media reflects diverse community responses. This study applies the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) method to classify sentiments from 7,733 YouTube comments. The results show that the LSTM model achieves 89% accuracy, with strong performance on negative sentiment (F1-score 0.94) but weaker performance on positive sentiment (F1-score 0.55) due to class imbalance, as negative data account for 87.7% of the dataset. These findings confirm the effectiveness of LSTM for sentiment analysis of Indonesian text while highlighting the challenge of imbalanced data. This research contributes to social media-based public policy evaluation
2604.26312.paper_summary_zh: 公眾對於YouTube社交媒體上免費營養餐計畫（MBG）的看法反映了社區的多元反應。這項研究應用了長短期記憶（LSTM）方法來分類7,733條YouTube評論中的情感。結果顯示，LSTM模型達到了89%的準確率，在負面情感上表現強勁（F1-score 0.94），但在正面情感上表現較弱（F1-score 0.55），這是由於類別不平衡，負面數據佔數據集的87.7%。這些發現確認了LSTM在印尼文本情感分析中的有效性，同時突顯了不平衡數據的挑戰。本研究對基於社交媒體的公共政策評估做出了貢獻。
2604.26312.author: Berliana Enda Putri et.al.
2604.26312.authors: Berliana Enda Putri, Lisa Diani Amelia, Muhammad Zaky Zaiddan, Luluk Muthoharoh, Ardika Satria, Martin Clinton Tosima Manullang
